name: law firm accountants processing 5–15 invoices/month tool
description: For law firm accountants processing 5–15 invoices/month, inaccurate billing statements cause cash flow gaps. We convert legal time sheets into formatted billing statements instead of manual formatting of billing statements.
problem_solved: Inaccurate billing statements from manual time sheet entries.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Inaccurate billing statements from manual time sheet entries.
